endpoints.name: Alolan Grimer (Cosmic Eclipse 130/236, green-yellow Alolan form)
Grimer (Darkness Ablaze 100/189, Kanto form, Ryota Murayama art)
Grimer (Brilliant Stars 084/172, Kanto form, Masakazu Fukuda art)

description: Wave 20 vision landed Alolan Grimer (CSE-130, green-yellow toxin form, Sekio art) — the third corpus Grimer print and the first to depict the Alolan regional form. Corpus already holds two Kanto Grimer prints (DAA-100 + BRS-084) with the identical Sun-era extinction-by-cleanup flavor text already cross-print mirrored in wave 18. Drew the 1:N regional-variant cross-form mirror with Alolan Grimer as the cohort's Alola-form anchor pointing to both Kanto prints. The pair-bond is load-bearing: same species (National Pokedex no. 88) occupies opposite ecological positions relative to environmental remediation — Kanto Grimer is endangered-by-cleanup (Sun-era Pokedex), Alolan Grimer is institutionally-employed-by-cleanup (Alola government canonically maintains the waste-disposal-site population per the printed CSE-130 flavor text). This is the franchise's most explicit ecology-and-labor split within a single species, and surfaces as bundle-cohesion-stack-ready material for any pollution-as-survival-niche or Pokemon-as-eco-infrastructure Discrete Lair work. Mirrors the Farfetch'd Kanto ↔ Galarian wave 16 pattern but at direct-1:N scope rather than via a cohort node (cohort node premature here — only 1 corpus Alolan card so far; if a second Alolan-form lands, an alolan-regional-forms cohort node becomes worth commissioning).
